_comment: Validated blog drip queue for the Maple Terroir TOF/MOF/BOF content plan. One post per day. A scheduled run writes the FIRST item whose file at blog/<slug>.html does not yet exist. Volumes are US (Mangools), KD is Mangools difficulty. Published items are marked done.
publish_steps_note: After writing each post: add it to sitemap.xml, add one inbound link from a sibling premium post, AND add a STATIC_POSTS entry in blog/index.html (the hub grid is Shopify-fed and will not show static posts otherwise). Then commit + push + verify 200.
brand_rules: no contractions; no em dashes; no jargon; Agency Rule; organic cert = SYRUP only (Ecocert/Canada Organic/USDA); '3rd Generation Farm' + '3x Certified'; Wayne Lytton founded 1978, son Shawn now; single-origin Quebec Appalachian; no invented stats; never cite a maple or stroopwafel competitor (no Escuminac); client ranks first in own-domain roundups.
